title: Kenya Application to Register a Company (Form CR1)
description: Kenya's Business Registration Service (BRS) Form CR1, "Application to Register a Company" (Section 13 of the Companies Act, 2015; prescribed under the Registrar of Companies (Forms) Rules, Legal Notice 103 of 2017), used to incorporate a company limited by shares (public or private), a company limited by guarantee, or a private unlimited company. Opens Kenya as GovSchema's 40th jurisdiction, via the Business Formation vertical (1 of 6). BRS's own current forms page (brs.go.ke/forms/) publishes CR1 as a Microsoft Word (.docx) template dated 2022-11 (upload) / 2017-11 (document content); this schema is sourced primarily from that current template rather than an older, plainer two-page PDF specimen dated 2016-02 that a Kenya Investment Authority eProcedures mirror also still hosts — see verification.notes and VERIFICATION.md for the full disclosed reasoning on why the newer, richer docx template was chosen as primary. Company registration in Kenya is now filed electronically through the BRS/eCitizen online portal; BRS's own CR1 template nonetheless remains the authoritative field-by-field specification of what a company registration requires, so this schema follows this registry's established "structural reference over a now-primarily-online process" framing (cf. pe/sunat/formulario-virtual-709-declaracion-renta, uy/dgi/inscripcion-actualizacion-empresas-formulario-0351). This v1.0.0 covers CR1's Parts I, II, III, IV and V (company details, proposed officers, statement of capital and initial shareholding, statement of guarantee, and additional PIN/NSSF/NHIF registrations); the registrar-internal "For official use only" / "Checked by" block is out of scope. Bounded repeating groups (directors/officers, share classes, initial-shareholding subscribers, guarantee members) are flattened to a disclosed cap of 2 slots each, per this registry's bounded-repeating-group convention.

source.documentRef: Form CR1, "Application to Register a Company" [section 13 of the Companies Act, 2015] — current template published on BRS's own Forms page (brs.go.ke/forms/); docx internal metadata records document authorship dated 2017-11-13, uploaded to brs.go.ke 2022-11. A plainer, earlier two-page PDF specimen of the same form ("APPLICATION TO REGISTER COMPANY LIMITED BY SHARES OR GUARANTEE OR IS UNLIMITED", dated 2016-02-02) is also still hosted at https://eprocedures.investkenya.go.ke/media/CR-1-APPLICATION-TO-REGISTER-COMPANY-LIMITED-BY-SHARES-OR-GUARANTEE-OR-IS-UNLIMITED%20(5).pdf and was fetched and cross-checked; both are disclosed in VERIFICATION.md.

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-2493. Opens Kenya (40th jurisdiction) via Business Formation (1 of 6). Fetched the BRS docx directly from brs.go.ke (HTTP 200, application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document, 37,952 bytes, sha256:45e367a6eb47c49fef17bc32cec18bd99d281f7ee61715b3eb19ba2968174a8d, Last-Modified 2022-12-21) and the older PDF specimen directly from eprocedures.investkenya.go.ke (HTTP 200, application/pdf, 192,752 bytes, sha256:0772ddb41d4511159fab22ba1fc11194bb0957a06d3388a0270833773e997100, Last-Modified 2016-02-02, PDF 1.5, Producer Microsoft Word 2010). pdfjs-dist getAnnotations() confirms the PDF has 0 AcroForm widgets across its 2 pages (IsAcroFormPresent: false) — a genuine blank-line fill-in-the-blank text form, not an interactive form. The PDF's own item 2 ("The company is a private company; or") and item 7 ("The liability of the members is limited by shares") print only ONE branch of each alternative with no visible second option or checkbox glyph in the extracted text/coordinate layout — an ambiguous, apparently-truncated specimen. The BRS docx resolves both ambiguities cleanly: it has an explicit 'Type of company' single-select item 2 with four printed options (public company limited by shares / private company limited by shares / company limited by guarantee / private unlimited company), each with its own empty drawn rectangle used as a mark-one-box widget (confirmed by inspecting the docx's raw word/document.xml drawing anchors — a genuine mark-one-of-four selection mechanism, not an AcroForm field), and a parallel single-select 'Articles of association' item 3 (own articles / model articles / model articles supplemented). Given this, this schema models the full 4-way company-type selection and the 3-way articles-of-association selection directly from the docx, rather than scoping down to a private-limited-by-shares-only path. Confirmed via fresh web search that the Companies Act, 2015 (Kenya Law, consolidated to 2024-12-27) and the Registrar of Companies (Forms) Rules, Legal Notice 103 of 2017 (consolidated to 2022-12-31) both remain in force and unrepealed, and that CR1 remains listed among the standard incorporation forms (CR1/CR2/CR8/Statement of Nominal Capital) in current (2025/2026) legal-practice guides, even though registration itself is now filed online via BRS/eCitizen. See VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing record, every scoping/disclosure judgment call (bounded repeating-group caps, the officer-role best-effort enum, the documents[] nationality carve-out, the final lodging-party field synthesized from both source editions), and the conformance run writeup (2 valid fixtures, 0 errors each; 4 mutation-control fixtures, exactly 1 error each; documents[] requiredness explicitly exercised).

fields.name: companyName
fields.label: Name of the company
fields.description: The proposed name of the company being registered (as reserved), without the legal-suffix designation (e.g. "Limited").
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part I, item 1: "Name of the company"

fields.name: companyType
fields.label: Type of company
fields.description: The single company type being registered, resolving both the private/public and shares/guarantee/unlimited distinctions in one field. The docx presents these as four mark-one-of-four options, each with its own empty drawn selection box; the older 2016 PDF specimen only prints the first alternative of each pairing with no visible second option, which is why this schema follows the docx rather than the PDF here.
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part I, item 2 "Type of company: (select the type of company that applies)" — Public company limited by shares / Private company limited by shares / Company limited by guarantee / Private unlimited company

fields.name: articlesOfAssociationOption
fields.label: Articles of association
fields.description: Whether the company adopts wholly bespoke articles, the model articles appropriate to the selected company type, or a combination of both.
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part I, item 3 "Articles of association ... (select the option that applies)" — has prepared its own articles of association / will adopt the model articles applicable to the type of company selected above / will adopt some of those model articles and has prepared its own articles to supplement or modify those model articles

fields.name: registeredOfficeBuildingOrPlotNo
fields.label: Registered office: name of the building/plot No.
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part I, item 4 "Registered office address" — "Name of the building/plot No."

fields.name: registeredOfficeStreetOrRoad
fields.label: Registered office: street/road
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part I, item 4 "Registered office address" — "Street/Road"

fields.name: registeredOfficeDistrict
fields.label: Registered office: district
fields.description: Not marked as obligatory by the source; some registered-office addresses (e.g. central Nairobi) have no meaningful district distinct from the town/county.
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part I, item 4 "Registered office address" — "District"

fields.name: registeredOfficeFloorOrRoomNo
fields.label: Registered office: floor/room No.
fields.description: Not marked as obligatory by the source; not every building has a distinct floor/room number.
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part I, item 4 "Registered office address" — "Floor/Room No."

fields.name: registeredOfficeTown
fields.label: Registered office: town
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part I, item 4 "Registered office address" — "Town"

fields.name: registeredOfficeCounty
fields.label: Registered office: county
fields.description: One of Kenya's 47 counties (Constitution of Kenya, 2010, First Schedule) — an enumerated closed list added by this schema for validation value; the source form itself leaves a plain blank rather than printing the county list.
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part I, item 4 "Registered office address" — "County"

fields.name: contactPoBox
fields.label: Contact address: P.O. Box
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part I, item 5 "Contact address of the company" — "P.O Box"

fields.name: contactPostalCode
fields.label: Contact address: postal code
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part I, item 5 "Contact address of the company" — "Postal Code"

fields.name: contactOfficeNo
fields.label: Contact address: office No.
fields.description: Not marked as obligatory by the source.
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part I, item 5 "Contact address of the company" — "Office No."

fields.name: contactMobileNo
fields.label: Contact address: mobile No.
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part I, item 5 "Contact address of the company" — "Mobile No."

fields.name: contactEmailAddress
fields.label: Contact address: email address
fields.description: Per the source's own footnote, this should be an email address that has never previously been used on iTax (the Kenya Revenue Authority's tax portal).
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part I, item 5 "Contact address of the company" — "Email Address"; footnote 2: "Please provide an email address which has never been used on iTax."

fields.name: primaryBusinessActivity
fields.label: Primary business activity
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part I, item 6 "Principal business activity" — "Primary business activity"

fields.name: secondaryBusinessActivity
fields.label: Secondary business activity
fields.description: Not marked as obligatory by the source.
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part I, item 6 "Principal business activity" — "Secondary business activity"

fields.name: officer1Name
fields.label: Officer 1: name
fields.description: The source's own printed officer table has exactly one row on the base form itself (also true of the older PDF specimen's single numbered "1" row), with an instruction to "compete [sic] a separate sheet for each director, secretary (if applicable) or authorised signatory" beyond that. This schema models a disclosed bounded cap of 2 officer slots as a schema-authoring convenience (per this registry's bounded-repeating-group convention), not because the source form itself prints a second row.
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part II, item 7 "Details of the first directors, secretary and authorized signatory of the company" — "Name"

fields.name: officer1Role
fields.label: Officer 1: designation
fields.description: Whether this person is a director, secretary, and/or authorised signatory. A best-effort enum collapsing the source's own multi-role footnote ("Please state whether the person is a director, secretary and/or authorised signatory") into named single- and combined-role values, since GovSchema v0.3 fields are flat/scalar with no multi-select primitive. Per the source's footnote 3, a private company only needs a secretary if its paid-up capital is KES 5,000,000 or more; this schema does not gate officer2's secretary-related values on paid-up capital (a disclosed simplification — see VERIFICATION.md).
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part II, item 7 "Details of the first directors, secretary and authorized signatory" — "Designation"; footnote 4

fields.name: officer1PostalAddress
fields.label: Officer 1: postal address
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part II, item 7 "Details of the first directors, secretary and authorized signatory" — "Postal Address"

fields.name: officer1IdentityDocumentType
fields.label: Officer 1: identity-document type
fields.description: The source form itself has a single blank labelled "Identity cord [sic] or passport number" with no separate document-type selector; this schema adds this discriminator field (a disclosed judgment call) so the passport-only sub-fields below can be cleanly gated with requiredWhen rather than guessed from the number's format.
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part II, item 7 — "Identity cord or passport number"; footnote 5

fields.name: officer1IdOrPassportNumber
fields.label: Officer 1: identity-card or passport number
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part II, item 7 — "Identity cord or passport number"

fields.name: officer1PassportIssuingCountry
fields.label: Officer 1: passport issuing country
fields.description: Per the source's own footnote, only completed if a passport number (rather than a national ID number) is given above.
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part II, item 7, footnote 5: "If a passport number is provided, please also indicate the issuing country and place and date of issue of the passport"

fields.name: officer1PassportIssuingPlace
fields.label: Officer 1: passport place of issue
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part II, item 7, footnote 5

fields.name: officer1PassportIssueDate
fields.label: Officer 1: passport date of issue
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part II, item 7, footnote 5

fields.name: officer1Nationality
fields.label: Officer 1: nationality
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part II, item 7 — "Nationality"

fields.name: officer1TelephoneNo
fields.label: Officer 1: telephone No.
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part II, item 7 — "Telephone No."

fields.name: officer1EmailAddress
fields.label: Officer 1: email address
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part II, item 7 — "Email Address"

fields.name: officer2Name
fields.label: Officer 2: name
fields.description: Second officer slot, per this schema's disclosed bounded cap of 2 (see officer1Name's description). All of officer 2's fields are optional, since the source form's base printed table has only one row.
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part II, item 7 — "Name" (schema-added second slot)

fields.label: Officer 2: designation
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part II, item 7 — "Designation" (schema-added second slot)

fields.label: Officer 2: postal address
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part II, item 7 — "Postal Address" (schema-added second slot)

fields.label: Officer 2: identity-document type
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part II, item 7 — "Identity cord or passport number" (schema-added second slot)

fields.name: officer2IdOrPassportNumber
fields.label: Officer 2: identity-card or passport number
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part II, item 7 — "Identity cord or passport number" (schema-added second slot)

fields.name: officer2PassportIssuingCountry
fields.label: Officer 2: passport issuing country
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part II, item 7, footnote 5 (schema-added second slot)

fields.name: officer2PassportIssuingPlace
fields.label: Officer 2: passport place of issue
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part II, item 7, footnote 5 (schema-added second slot)

fields.name: officer2PassportIssueDate
fields.label: Officer 2: passport date of issue
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part II, item 7, footnote 5 (schema-added second slot)

fields.name: officer2Nationality
fields.label: Officer 2: nationality
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part II, item 7 — "Nationality" (schema-added second slot)

fields.name: officer2TelephoneNo
fields.label: Officer 2: telephone No.
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part II, item 7 — "Telephone No." (schema-added second slot)

fields.name: officer2EmailAddress
fields.label: Officer 2: email address
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part II, item 7 — "Email Address" (schema-added second slot)

fields.name: shareCapitalAmountKes
fields.label: Share capital (KES)
fields.description: Applies only when the company is limited by shares (Part III "Statement of Capital"). The source's own text: "Please complete this part if the company has a share capital. If the company does not have a share capital, please go to part IV below."
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 8 "Statement of Capital" — "If the company is limited by shares, its share capital is KES-"

fields.name: shareCapitalNumberOfShares
fields.label: Share capital: number of shares
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 8 — "... divide into – number of shares of KES- each"

fields.name: shareCapitalNominalValuePerShareKes
fields.label: Share capital: nominal value of each share (KES)
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 8 — "... of KES- each"

fields.name: shareClass1Name
fields.label: Share class 1: class of shares
fields.description: The share-class table prints 3 blank data rows plus a totals row; this schema models a disclosed bounded cap of 2 share-class slots.
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 8 table — "Class of shares (e.g. ordinary/preference etc.)"

fields.name: shareClass1NominalValueKes
fields.label: Share class 1: nominal value of shares (KES)
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 8 table — "Nominal value of shares"

fields.name: shareClass1AmountPaidUpKes
fields.label: Share class 1: amount paid up on each share (KES)
fields.description: Not marked as unconditionally obligatory beyond the shares-vs-guarantee gate — "if any" per the source.
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 8 table — "Amount paid up on each share (if any) (KES)"

fields.name: shareClass1AmountUnpaidKes
fields.label: Share class 1: amount unpaid on each share (KES)
fields.description: Not marked as unconditionally obligatory — "if any" per the source.
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 8 table — "Amount (if any) unpaid on each share (KES)"

fields.name: shareClass1TotalNumberOfShares
fields.label: Share class 1: total number of shares
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 8 table — "Total No. of shares"

fields.name: shareClass1AggregateNominalValueKes
fields.label: Share class 1: aggregate nominal value (KES)
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 8 table — "Aggregate nominal value"

fields.name: shareClass2Name
fields.label: Share class 2: class of shares
fields.description: Second share-class slot, per this schema's disclosed bounded cap of 2 (see shareClass1Name's description). Optional — most companies registering have only one class of shares.
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 8 table — "Class of shares" (schema-added second slot)

fields.name: shareClass2NominalValueKes
fields.label: Share class 2: nominal value of shares (KES)
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 8 table — "Nominal value of shares" (schema-added second slot)

fields.name: shareClass2AmountPaidUpKes
fields.label: Share class 2: amount paid up on each share (KES)
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 8 table — "Amount paid up on each share (if any) (KES)" (schema-added second slot)

fields.name: shareClass2AmountUnpaidKes
fields.label: Share class 2: amount unpaid on each share (KES)
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 8 table — "Amount (if any) unpaid on each share (KES)" (schema-added second slot)

fields.name: shareClass2TotalNumberOfShares
fields.label: Share class 2: total number of shares
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 8 table — "Total No. of shares" (schema-added second slot)

fields.name: shareClass2AggregateNominalValueKes
fields.label: Share class 2: aggregate nominal value (KES)
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 8 table — "Aggregate nominal value" (schema-added second slot)

fields.name: totalNumberOfSharesAllClasses
fields.label: TOTALS: total number of shares (all classes)
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 8 table, "TOTALS" row — total number of shares

fields.name: totalAggregateNominalValueAllClassesKes
fields.label: TOTALS: aggregate nominal value (all classes, KES)
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 8 table, "TOTALS" row — aggregate nominal value

fields.name: votingRightsDescription
fields.label: Rights attached to shares: voting rights
fields.description: Not marked as unconditionally obligatory by the source beyond the general instruction to "set out below particulars of each of the following class of shares specified above."
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 9 "Rights attached to each class of shares" — "Voting rights, including rights that arise only in certain circumstances"

fields.name: dividendRightsDescription
fields.label: Rights attached to shares: dividend/distribution rights
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 9 — "Rights to dividends or distribution"

fields.name: capitalReturnRightsDescription
fields.label: Rights attached to shares: right to participate in a return of capital
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 9 — "Right to participate in a return of capital"

fields.name: redemptionTermsDescription
fields.label: Rights attached to shares: redemption terms
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 9 — "Whether the shares will be redeemed or may be redeemed ... and if so, any terms or conditions relating to the redemption of the shares"

fields.name: subscriber1NameAndAddress
fields.label: Subscriber 1: name and address
fields.description: Statement of initial shareholding. The source prints 10 numbered subscriber rows; this schema models a disclosed bounded cap of 2 subscriber slots (see officer1Name's description for the same convention).
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 10 "Statement of initial shareholding" table, row 1 — "Name and address of the subscriber to the memorandum of association"

fields.name: subscriber1ClassOfShares
fields.label: Subscriber 1: class of shares
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 10 table, row 1 — "Class of shares (e.g. ordinary/preference etc.)"

fields.name: subscriber1NumberOfSharesHeld
fields.label: Subscriber 1: number of shares held
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 10 table, row 1 — "Number of shares held"

fields.name: subscriber1NominalValuePerShareKes
fields.label: Subscriber 1: nominal value of each share (KES)
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 10 table, row 1 — "Nominal value of each share (KES)"

fields.name: subscriber1AmountPaidUpPerShareKes
fields.label: Subscriber 1: amount paid up on each share (KES)
fields.description: "If any" per the source.
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 10 table, row 1 — "Amount to be paid up on each share (if any) (KES)"

fields.name: subscriber1AmountUnpaidPerShareKes
fields.label: Subscriber 1: amount unpaid on each share (KES)
fields.description: "If any" per the source.
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 10 table, row 1 — "Amount (if any) to be unpaid on each share (KES)"

fields.name: subscriber2NameAndAddress
fields.label: Subscriber 2: name and address
fields.description: Second subscriber slot, per this schema's disclosed bounded cap of 2 (see subscriber1NameAndAddress's description). Optional — a single-shareholder company only needs subscriber 1.
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 10 table, row 2 — "Name and address of the subscriber to the memorandum of association"

fields.name: subscriber2ClassOfShares
fields.label: Subscriber 2: class of shares
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 10 table, row 2 — "Class of shares"

fields.name: subscriber2NumberOfSharesHeld
fields.label: Subscriber 2: number of shares held
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 10 table, row 2 — "Number of shares held"

fields.name: subscriber2NominalValuePerShareKes
fields.label: Subscriber 2: nominal value of each share (KES)
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 10 table, row 2 — "Nominal value of each share (KES)"

fields.name: subscriber2AmountPaidUpPerShareKes
fields.label: Subscriber 2: amount paid up on each share (KES)
fields.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part III, item 10 table, row 2 — "Amount to be paid up on each share (if any) (KES)"

fields.name: subscriber2AmountUnpaidPerShareKes

See VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: Cross-referenced from the 2016 PDF specimen, page 2: "Address of the person lodging this application"

fields.name: lodgedByCapacity
fields.label: Capacity of the person lodging (subscriber or agent)

fields.sourceRef: Cross-referenced from the 2016 PDF specimen, page 2: "(Subscriber/Agent) (Strike out whichever does not apply)"

documents.label: Copy of Kenyan national identification card or passport (per director/secretary/authorised signatory)

documents.label: Copy of PIN certificate issued by Kenya Revenue Authority (per director/secretary/authorised signatory)
documents.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part II — "Copy of PIN certificate issued by Kenya Revenue Authority (not applicable to persons who are not Kenyan residents)"

documents.label: Officers' consent to act
documents.statement: I/We hereby consent to act as director/ secretary of the company.
documents.sourceRef: Form CR1 (docx), Part II, item 7 — "I/We hereby consent to act as director/ secretary of the company."
